items.claim: Alessandro Costa is capable of defending takedowns and getting back up if taken down.
items.quote: He needs to start working, defend the takedowns, get right back up if taken down

items.claim: Cody Durden has won five of the 14 fights in which he was an underdog.
items.quote: Cody Durden has been an underdog in 14 of his 16 UFC fights. Of those 14 fights, he has won five of them.

items.claim: John Garces has been submitted twice in his amateur career.
items.quote: He's been submitted twice in the amateur scene.

items.claim: Farid Basharat is not a finisher but is very good at winning minutes.
items.quote: I know he's not really a finisher, but he can find the finish if the opportunity presents itself, and he's very good at winning minutes.

items.claim: Kai Kara-France has been to a split decision six times in his career.
items.quote: Kai Kara-France has been to a split decision six times already.

items.claim: Luke Riley has shown the ability to maintain his performance over a full 15-minute fight.
items.quote: Luke Riley has shown he can go a hard 15 if he can't find the finish

items.claim: Adrian Yanez has improved since his loss to Rob Font.
items.quote: Yanez was put out bad by Rob Font, but he did improve since then.

items.claim: Terrance McKinney holds the record for the shortest average fight time in UFC history.
items.quote: His average fight time, the shortest average fight time in UFC history, 2 minutes and 16 seconds.

items.claim: Lo' Ervin Cavenar has significant muscle mass which can cause him to slow down.
items.quote: Cavenar has so much muscle mass and can slow down

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis fights with a reckless style.
items.quote: I do think that Benoit Saint Denis does fight a little reckless.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett is not defensively sound.
items.quote: Paddy gets hit a lot. Both of these guys are not as defensively sound.

items.claim: Conor McGregor tends to gas as the fight goes on.
items.quote: Conor tends to gas as the fight goes on.
